name: Merge
description: Merge unified API platform for HRIS, ATS, CRM, and accounting integrations

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Merge
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Copy your production API key
4. Paste it below

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists employees via Merge HRIS API to verify unified HR data access

checks.name: App Availability
